876.name: Black Hole

attributes.value: Mibera drawn within a black hole, evoking uncertainty
A black hole is a region of spacetime where gravity is so strong that nothing — not even light — can escape.

2769.name: Air
2769.description: Cloud-like figure with sun filtering through

attributes.value: Cloud-like figure with sun filtering through
Every Mibera is assigned one of four classical elements based on their birth coordinates.

4803.name: Aries
4803.description: Dumuzi the Shepherd as Aries with ram skull and Mars frequency

attributes.value: Dumuzi the Shepherd as Aries with ram skull and Mars frequency
